'''âj-b-m-d''' ('''kajabmedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbrace|imbrace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbrace|imbrace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-b-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajabmedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijabmedoko|thijabmedoko]] || [[word:jijabmedoko|jijabmedoko]] || [[word:shijabmedoko|shijabmedoko]] || [[word:kijabmedoko|kijabmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujabmedoko|thuthujabmedoko]] || [[word:jujujabmedoko|jujujabmedoko]] || [[word:shushujabmedoko|shushujabmedoko]] || [[word:kukujabmedoko|kukujabmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujabmedoko|thujabmedoko]] || [[word:jujabmedoko|jujabmedoko]] || [[word:shujabmedoko|shujabmedoko]] || [[word:kujabmedoko|kujabmedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujabmedoko|thujabmedoko]] || [[word:jujabmedoko|jujabmedoko]] || [[word:shujabmedoko|shujabmedoko]] || [[word:kujabmedoko|kujabmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejabmedoko|thejabmedoko]] || [[word:jejabmedoko|jejabmedoko]] || [[word:shejabmedoko|shejabmedoko]] || [[word:kejabmedoko|kejabmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojabmedoko|thothojabmedoko]] || [[word:jojojabmedoko|jojojabmedoko]] || [[word:shoshojabmedoko|shoshojabmedoko]] || [[word:kokojabmedoko|kokojabmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojabmedoko|thojabmedoko]] || [[word:jojabmedoko|jojabmedoko]] || [[word:shojabmedoko|shojabmedoko]] || [[word:kojabmedoko|kojabmedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojabmedoko|thojabmedoko]] || [[word:jojabmedoko|jojabmedoko]] || [[word:shojabmedoko|shojabmedoko]] || [[word:kojabmedoko|kojabmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjabmedoko|thĂŠjabmedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjabmedoko|jĂŠjabmedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjabmedoko|shĂŠjabmedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjabmedoko|kĂŠjabmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajabmedoko|thathajabmedoko]] || [[word:jajajabmedoko|jajajabmedoko]] || [[word:shashajabmedoko|shashajabmedoko]] || [[word:kakajabmedoko|kakajabmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajabmedoko|thajabmedoko]] || [[word:jajabmedoko|jajabmedoko]] || [[word:shajabmedoko|shajabmedoko]] || [[word:kajabmedoko|kajabmedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajabmedoko|thajabmedoko]] || [[word:jajabmedoko|jajabmedoko]] || [[word:shajabmedoko|shajabmedoko]] || [[word:kajabmedoko|kajabmedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
